name: Filtered Search Evasion
description: A product catalog has a keyword-based WAF that blocks common SQL injection patterns. Bypass the filter using encoding tricks, alternative syntax, and case manipulation to extract the flag.
briefing: NovaTech's product catalog has been hardened with an application-level WAF that blocks common SQL injection keywords: UNION, SELECT, FROM, WHERE, OR, AND, and comment sequences. However, the underlying query is still vulnerable. Use creative bypass techniques — inline comments, case variation, URL encoding, alternative MySQL syntax — to evade the filter and extract the flag from the 'waf_secrets' table.
objective: Bypass the WAF keyword filter and perform SQL injection to extract the flag from the waf_secrets table.
author: h4ck0rman
